changes.shortBio: A puzzle solver and voracious reader. A passionate robotics and rocketry engineer in the making. Driven by the interest in rocketry and robotics to strive for better results guided by reliable designs & data.

userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
